chunks.content:
Article: Is there more than 13th Angels 4 impacts 13 Eva Unit
[]: Is there more than 13th Angels/4 impacts/13 Eva Unit?             Quote Post by Shakivara777 » Wed Sep 23, 2015 1:22 pm OK, so who would expect that we will see a 4th impact in 3.0 who said that Kaworu was the last angel(there is 14 year time skip and angels aperead after 15 years from the second impact so maybe angels will apear again after the 4th impact in the final movie) who know maybe there is more than 13 eva units...............just maybe(anno will work on 3.0+1.0 after godzilla 2016 its long time to wait so feel free to talk)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Sep 23, 2015 1:34 pm Kaworu's line about the beginning and the end being one and the same would be pretty pointless if there were anymore Angels. Same with Gendo's line about Unit-13 being the final executor.

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Mon Oct 05, 2015 6:27 pm Can't wait for eva vs eva fights. EoE's eva series plugs read "kaworu 0.something" so I guess it's either clones or stuff I don't really care about, the final Asuka fight is easily the best one among gazillion of animes.
